title: Voxel's End Update Mod
description: My first ever Java Mod. Aims to massively improve your MC Endgame experience.
body:
***This Mod Is Compatible With The "Better End Cities Vanilla" Mod***

I would like to introduce you all to my first ever Minecraft Java Mod, Voxel's End Update Mod! The purpose of this mod is to not only improve The End dimension, but to improve your overall MC Endgame experience. Has Minecraft ever felt too easy? Too quick? Well worry not, for there is a massive amount of stuff to do after defeating the Ender Dragon now! Not only is there more to do, but more challenge overall.
Here's a preview to get started!
[Voxel's End Update Mod Preview](https://youtu.be/j6nwY1eawsk?si=2AWujQmDTJjnNW2B)
Now that you've watched that (or haven't) let's get into some details.

-[See Gallery for images]-

-NEW ORES!-

Yes there is new ores, not just 1, but 4. Endorium, Endtal, Endeiron, and Endire. Endorium, Endtal, and Endeiron can be used to create new sets of armor and tools. Endorium and Endtal armor and tools are basically The End's and the Alternate End's equivalent to Netherite. Endorium is exclusive to The End while Endtal is exclusive to the Alternate End. Endeiron equipment on the olther hand, is much stronger than Endorium or Endtal, with a durability of 3,122! It is much more difficult to obtain.

-CRAFTABLE ELYTRAS-

You can now craft Elytras! You need 6 Golden Evupul Wings and 1 String. Elytras are now gold in color to compensate for the new crafting recipe.

![Elytra Crafting Recipe](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/NIt15iiZ/images/f40011e72b331339831351312038387a3163af88.png)

![New Elytra Look](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/NIt15iiZ/images/86daabc5556212438b0ea5ec31bcc314b22d0ba4.png)

-NEW BIOMES-

Ever thought The End was too barren? Not anymore. Theres 9 new biomes, consisting of:

The Purul Forest.

The Aphal Islands.

The Endesert.

The Frost Cave.

The Endra Forest.

The Burmylon Swamp.

The Glymeron Forest.

The Linsera Forest.

The Mullaphus Sporelands.

The Purul Forest, Aphal Islands, Endesert, and the Frost Cave can be found in The End. The other 5 biomes can be found in the Alternate End.

-NUREALM-

This is essentially the anti End, it is the home dimension of The Nusagar.

-ANTI GRAVITY POTION-

A new potion that makes it so you can walk in air, but is best when used with an Elytra. When wearing an Elytra while having the Anti Gravity effect applied, it allows you to jump 19 blocks high. Brewed with a Golden Evupul Wing.

-NEW MOBS-

Tired of seeing just Endermen everywhere? Well here's a ton of new ones!

Watcher.

Evupul.

Golden Evupul.

Dark Evupul.

Green, Purple, and Black Dragonflies.

Bonefly.

Mistfly.

Yenog.

Sish.

Linserafer.

    Chat with a Linserafer for some lore and the Nusa Portal Activation guide!

Aphalaf Plant.

Isogal.

Iceogal.

    Isogals and Iceogals can be tamed with Endtal, and can be equipped with 4 different types of Isogal Armor. An armored Isogal/Iceogal can then be equipped with the Amulet of the Nurealm, which allows them to traverse through the Nusa Portal.

End Baron.

Small Dragon.

Baby Ender Dragon.

    Can be hatched from the Dragon Egg with an Incubator.

Tamed Ender Dragon.

    The final stage of the Baby Ender Dragon. Can be ridden. Requirements must be met for it to progress to each stage.

White Enderman.

Nuskull.

Nuclear Nuskull.

Nusa Demon.

-BOSSES-

The Aphalaf Boss-

    Spawns rarely in the Aphal Islands.

The Nusagar-

    Summoned atop a Nusa Tower with a Nusa Core. Extremely powerful. Don't fight it unless you're truly prepared, or you'll regret it.... Has its own boss theme (a modified version of the Ender Dragon boss theme).

-RESPAWNING-

You can now respawn in The End (and Alternate End) with a Void Anchor! No more worrying about losing that cool End City you just found, you can even respawn in it if you want!

-TRAVEL-

Traveling between The End and the Alternate End is fairly easy. You just need to craft a Breacher and you'll be placed in the exact spot in the dimension you're not currently in. Just be careful where you use it, as some of the smaller island don't all generate the same.

-RAISING YOUR BABY ENDER DRAGON-

Once you've hatched the Baby Ender Dragon, you must raise ikt in specific ways for it to grow.
Stage 1 to stage 2: Feed it 10 Dragonfruit. Stage 2 to 3: Take it through all the biomes in The End and Alternate End. Stage 3 to 4: Have it kill 15 mobs which can consist any of: Isogals, Aphalaf Plants, Dark Evupuls, and End Barons. Stage 4 to 5: The same thing as last stage but 30 mobs and 3 Aphalaf Bosses. Stage 5 is the final forme.

-THE NUSAGAR-

The Nusagar has 800 hp. It is way stronger than any other MC boss mob. When defeated, all players in the area recieve an achievement and a Nusa Blade, the strongest weapon in the game.

-NEW ENCHANTMENTS!-  

They are Aphalaf's Curse and Healing Wish.

Aphalaf's Curse is a weapon enchantment which will inflict the attacked mob with Weakness for 30 seconds, it is dropped as an enchanted book upon defeating the Aphalaf Boss.
Healing Wish is a weapon enchantment which has a 1/3 chance to heal 3 health of the user of a weapon enchanted with Healing Wish upon attacking a mob, it is obtained rarely from loot chests throughout The End and The Alternate End.


A toggle called "Ultra Nightmare" can be enabled on world creation, which significantly increases the difficulty of the mod.

There's much more to the mod, you should check it out to find out the rest!
